requirements: R1: leads_to(tree, executed_by(tree, 'collect personal data', 'credit bureau service'), 'send email notification')
R3: leads_to(tree, 'check customer bank privilege', 'check credit worthiness')
R4: leads_to(tree, 'check credit worthiness', 'evaluate loan risk')
R5: (executed_by(tree, 'check customer bank privilege', 'credit broker') or executed_by(tree, 'check customer bank privilege', 'supervisor'))
R7: executed_by_return(tree, 'check customer bank privilege') != executed_by_return(tree, 'check credit worthiness')
R8: executed_by(tree, 'check risk acceptability', 'branch office manager')
R9: (executed_by(tree, 'approve request', 'branch office manager') or executed_by(tree, 'reject request', 'branch office manager'))
R10: max_time_between(tree, 'sign loan contract', 'close loan offer', '7 working days')
R13: condition_directly_follows(tree, '(loanRequestCredit > 1000000) and (supervisorCheckPerformed == false)', 'create suspense file')
